surface_strategies.main_menu: Crystal Glass - bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-b border-white/10 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]
surface_strategies.hud: Minimalist - Transparent background, elements rely on drop-shadows (drop-shadow-[0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]) for contrast over game canvas.
surface_strategies.inventory_panel: Neumorphic/Tactile Dark - bg-[#0A0A0C] border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-sm p-6

buttons.primary: bg-transparent border border-red-900/50 text-red-50 hover:bg-red-900/20 hover:border-red-500 hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-sm font-bold
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,255,255,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 px-6 py-2 tracking-widest uppercase text-xs

inventory_slot.default: w-16 h-16 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:border-white/30 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer
inventory_slot.equipped: w-16 h-16 bg-blue-900/20 border border-blue-500/50 shadow-[inset_0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.2)] flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer

progress_bars.health: h-3 bg-neutral-900 border border-white/10 overflow-hidden relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:inset-0 after:bg-red-600 after:w-full
progress_bars.mana: h-2 bg-neutral-900 border border-white/10 overflow-hidden relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:inset-0 after:bg-sky-500 after:w-[60%]

images.description: Gothic castle background shrouded in mist

icons.usage: Use for UI elements like settings, close buttons, and inventory categories. Keep them subtle with opacity-70 by default, opacity-100 on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React for the DOM-based UI (Main Menu, HUD Overlay, Pause Menu, Inventory).
The actual game should be rendered on an HTML5 `<canvas>` using a game loop (requestAnimationFrame).
Overlay the React UI on top of the canvas using absolute/fixed positioning and pointer-events-none where necessary so clicks pass through to the game canvas unless interacting with a menu.
For the typography, import Cormorant Garamond and Outfit from Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Main Menu' with the provided gothic castle background image. Use a heavy dark overlay to ensure text contrast.

The HUD should be absolutely positioned at the top left/right. Health bars should use the provided red accent, mana/stamina should use sky blue/amber. Do not use generic Shadcn progress bars, build custom jagged or sharp-edged bars via Tailwind.
For the inventory system, implement a bento-grid layout overlay that pauses the game when opened. Use a dark glassmorphism panel.
Ensure the game canvas handles basic physics (gravity, velocity), collision detection, and input handling for movement (WASD/Arrows), jumping (Space), dash (Shift), and attacking (J/Left Click).
All interactive UI buttons must have 'data-testid' attributes.
